title: Faithful Fusion Connected Default Glass 64x Add-on
description: Makes Faithful 64x default glass textures connected for non-Optifine users.
body:
Addons for the Faithful 64x texture pack. Makes glass blocks and glass panes connect beautifully.\
Put it on top of the [Faithful 64x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-64x) texture pack so it works properly.

## **Example This Default Type Glass Addon:**
![Before and After Comparison.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f611a002e0a9f5403013d0b247d1e6ff053287c6_0.webp)

<details>
<summary>If you need these Addons, with different types you can download them here:</summary>

Faithful Fusion Connected (FFC) Clean Glass 32x. ([Visit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-fusion-connected-clean-glass-32x-add-on))\
Faithful Fusion Connected (FFC) Default Glass 32x. ([Visit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-fusion-connected-default-glass-32x-add-on))\
Faithful Fusion Connected (FFC) Clean Glass 64x. ([Visit](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-fusion-connected-clean-glass-64x-add-on))\
Faithful Fusion Connected (FFC) Default Glass 64x. (This addon)

</details>

## **REQUIRES:**

This texture pack addon also requires [Fusion (Connected Textures)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) by [SuperMartin642](https://modrinth.com/user/SuperMartijn642) to work.

## Note:

This add-ons is not compatible with [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity), as Faithful already has Optifine add-ons built-in. If you want to use these addons with Continuity, you can get support by joining our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/54jf2kuwVb).\
So, if you're using Optifine, you don't need this. Faithful 64x already has it (Default type).
